description: The main objective of this pipeline is to remove columns from a table. The pipeline starts with a node that removes columns and ends with another node that also removes columns, in between there are other nodes that remove columns as well.

aa44a267-3b43-4739-b1c5-880bc0fe2b1b.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name
